steps.title: Spot the contrast between surface impression and actual complexity
steps.content:
The passage uses but in fact to signal a reversal. A casual description makes the work seem [blank], explained by the coffee-shop-painting example that may not sound particularly ambitious, then but in fact reveals the work is actually complex and serious.

The blank describes the false impression.

steps.title: Identify which word names the false impression
steps.content: Unassuming captures the modest, unimpressive quality that may not sound particularly ambitious describes. The other three either don't capture an understated impression or reverse the relationship. That is the correct answer.
